text:
A physician ordered an assessment by a medical social worker for a multiple sclerosis 
patient who was unable to move anything but her head and who had an indwelling 
catheter. The patient had experienced recurring urinary tract infections and multiple 
infected ulcers. The physician ordered medical social services after the HHA indicated to 
him that the home was not well cared for, the patient appeared to be neglected much of 
the time, and the relationship between the patient and family
